{
    "cefr_level": "A2",
    "level_basis": {
        "textinspector_level_raw": null,
        "flesch_kincaid": null,

    },
    "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",
    "communicative_task_notes": [
        "Response meets the sentence count requirement (approx. 11 sentences).",
        "Provides relevant tips on time management and lifestyle."
    ],
    "grammar_score": 0.45,
    "corrections": [
        "i -> I (Register; A1; Low)",
        "simular -> similar (Spelling; A2; Low)",
        "is the tips -> are the tips (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
        "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
        "time to TV -> time on TV (Preposition; A2; Medium)",
        "leave from -> leave (Lexis; A2; Medium)",
        "I hope, -> I hope (Punctuation; A2; Low)",
        "at personal messages -> in personal messages (Preposition; A2; Medium)",
        "enought -> enough (Spelling; A2; Low)"
    ],
    "errors_by_category": {
        "Lexis": [
            {
                "excerpt": "leave from",
                "correction": "leave",
                "comment": "Incorrect preposition with verb 'leave'.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Grammar": [
            {
                "excerpt": "is the tips",
                "correction": "are the tips",
                "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "this apps",
                "correction": "these apps",
                "comment": "Demonstrative pronoun agreement with plural noun.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Punctuation": [
            {
                "excerpt": "I hope,",
                "correction": "I hope",
                "comment": "Unnecessary comma after introductory clause.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Word order": [],
        "Sentence structure": [],
        "Text organization": [],
        "Discourse markers": [],
        "Rhetorical features": [],
        "Register": [
            {
                "excerpt": "i",
                "correction": "I",
                "comment": "Lowercase first-person pronoun.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A1"
            }
        ],
        "Incomprehensibility": []
    },
    "strengths": [
        {
            "item": "For more information",
            "cefr_level": "B1",
            "category": "Discourse marker",
            "note": "Appropriate formal transition phrase."
        },
        {
            "item": "Manage your time",
            "cefr_level": "B1",
            "category": "Vocabulary",
            "note": "Standard collocation for the topic."
        }
    ],
    "feedback": "Level A2: The text fulfills the task requirements but is characterized by frequent basic errors in grammar (agreement, prepositions) and spelling. Sentence structures are simple. While some B1 vocabulary is present, the overall control remains at A2 due to error density.",
    "next_steps": [
        "Review subject-verb agreement (is/are, this/these).",
        "Practice common prepositions (on TV, in messages).",
        "Proofread for spelling and capitalization before submitting."
    ]
}

        },
        {
            "item": "though you shouldn't use other's works a lot, it's actually ok",
            "cefr_level": "B2",
            "category": "Sentence structure",
            "note": "Complex sentence with concessive clause."
        },
        {
            "item": "overload",
            "cefr_level": "B2",
            "category": "Vocabulary",
            "note": "Appropriate verb choice for context."
        }
    ],
    "feedback": "Level B1: Strong task achievement and good use of connectors, but grammatical accuracy (articles, word order, punctuation) prevents a B2 rating. The text is coherent and fulfills the prompt requirements well.",
    "next_steps": [
        "Review article usage (a/an/the) with singular nouns.",
        "Practice punctuation for compound sentences (avoid comma splices).",
        "Refine quantifier structures (each of my days vs each my day)."
    ]
}
